summary: Added shader compilation validation gate: ShaderErrorCollector captures errors via renderer.debug.onShaderError (registered once in scene.ts), validateShaderCompilation forces compilation via renderer.compile() and throws on failures, ModeManager.initAllForValidation() inits all geometry systems for upfront validation, and renderLoop.ts integrates validation before the first render frame. All 18 US-048 tests pass alongside 719 total tests.
